topic: multiplying fractions and whole numbers by 2, doubling recipe quantities
latex:
Travis's favorite drink is a Pineapple Lemonade. He wants to make two batches. Fill in the following table for how much of each ingredient he will need.

\begin{tabular}{|c|c|c|}
\hline
\textbf{Batches} & 1 & 2 \\
\hline
lemons & 4 & \\
\hline
water (quarts) & 1 & \\
\hline
sugar (cups) & $\frac{1}{2}$ & \\
\hline
pineapple juice (cups) & $\frac{3}{2}$ & \\
\hline
lemon-lime soda (cups) & $\frac{3}{4}$ & \\
\hline
\end{tabular}
answer_latex: lemons: $8$, water: $2$, sugar: $1$, pineapple juice: $3$, lemon-lime soda: $1\frac{1}{2}$
